revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Commonscat|1874 in China}} {{Year by category |m=1 |c=8 |d=7 |y=5 |cat=中国 |sortkey=ちゆうこく |parent=各年の中国 |subcat=1875年の各国 }…」
revision.text:
{{Commonscat|1874 in China}} {{Year by category |m=1 |c=8 |d=7 |y=5 |cat=中国 |sortkey=ちゆうこく |parent=各年の中国 |subcat=1875年の各国 }}
[[Category:1874年のアジア|ちゆうこく]]

{{Commonscat|1874 in China}} {{Year by category |m=1 |c=8 |d=7 |y=4 |cat=中国 |sortkey=ちゆうこく |parent=各年の中国 |subcat=1874年の各国 }}
[[Category:1874年のアジア|ちゆうこく]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:kkkk]]" to ""
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: update/create Tier‑4 category
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[en:Category:1874 in China]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with enwiki]] [[ja:Category:1874年の中国]] [[azb:Category:۱۸۷۴-جو ایلده چین]] [[commons:Category:1874 in China]] [[es:Category:China en 1874]] [[fr:Category:1874 en Chine]] [[hy:Category:1874 Չինաստանում]] [[ko:Category:1874년 중국]] [[ru:Category:1874 год в Китае]] [[sr:Category:Кина у 1874.]] [[ur:Category:چین میں 1874ء]] [[zh:Category:1874年中國]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Taiwan_Expedition_of_1874]].

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[en:Category:1874 in China]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with enwiki]] [[ja:Category:1874年の中国]] [[azb:Category:۱۸۷۴-جو ایلده چین]] [[commons:Category:1874 in China]] [[es:Category:China en 1874]] [[fr:Category:1874 en Chine]] [[hy:Category:1874 Չինաստանում]] [[ko:Category:1874년 중국]] [[ru:Category:1874 год в Китае]] [[sr:Category:Кина у 1874.]] [[ur:Category:چین میں 1874ء]] [[zh:Category:1874年中國]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
